footer.tagline: Science applied to cycling. Under the Cycling 3.0 paradigm: data with ethics by design.

hero.eyebrow: Cycling Research Center · Science applied to cycling
hero.title: We research how <highlight>every watt</highlight> is won.
hero.subtitle: A sports science research group specialised in cycling. Coaching, research, training camps and education under the Cycling 3.0 paradigm.

1.0.title: What we leave behind.
1.0.body: Hierarchy, intuition and secrecy. Tacit decisions, with no scientific collaboration.

3.0.title: The era amplified by AI.
3.0.body: Analytics with ethical governance and human right to decide.

t1.label: 1990s — 2000s
t1.description: Doping scandals and structural crisis of the Cycling 1.0 model.

t2.label: 2012 · 2.0 is born
t2.description: Zabala & Atkinson formalise Athlete 2.0 in Journal of Science and Cycling.

t3.description: Generative AI and predictive models burst into sport.

t4.label: 2025 · 3.0 is born
t4.description: Zabala publishes From Cycling 1.0 and 2.0 to Cycling 3.0.

t5.label: Today
t5.description: We apply the 3.0 paradigm to elite performance.

quote.attribution: — Zabala, 2025 · Journal of Science and Cycling

research.title: Scientific research applied to cycling.
research.body: We study what moves cycling and publish what we discover. Physiology, biomechanics, anti-doping, psychology and artificial intelligence.

coaching.title: Coaching grounded in Cycling 3.0.
coaching.body: Individual programmes and pro teams. We've trained world and Olympic champions.

training-camps.title: Camps across the Mediterranean.
training-camps.body: Designed for groups and pro teams with full scientific support.

formacion.title: Scientific education for coaches.
formacion.body: Federation courses, mentoring and university programmes.
